rationale: Ukraine war continues without new escalation near Romania's Black Sea border; Iran deal impasse keeps mild energy uncertainty but no structural change affecting Romanian daily life.

top_events.title: Tehran contradicts Trump on Iran deal progress
top_events.summary: No deal finalized; energy market uncertainty persists mildly. Romania as an energy importer feels indirect pressure from unresolved global oil price signals.

top_events.title: Ukraine-Russia cross-border attacks continue
top_events.summary: Ongoing strikes near Romania's northeastern neighborhood; no new escalation toward Black Sea or Moldova, but baseline security concern remains.

top_events.title: Pope Leo visits Canary Islands highlighting migrant journeys
top_events.summary: Migration routes from Africa to Europe highlighted; Romania is less directly affected by Atlantic migration but EU-wide migration politics can influence Romanian EU policy environment.
